results.title: Jason Bateman Reveals His Arrest in Monaco for Being Drunk in a Leopard Outfit
results.description: When your life is front and center on the world stage, it’s hard to keep secrets. Actor Jason Bateman has never been one to shy away from the spotlight, starring in hits like Ozark and Arrested Development. He recently pulled back the curtain on his own life on the SmartLess podcast, sharing a bizarre story ...

results.title: Big Uptick In SummerSlam 2026 Ticket Sales After $25 Deal
results.description: WWE appears to have gained significant momentum in ticket sales for the first night of SummerSlam 2026, with the latest numbers showing a major increase in attendance over the past few days. According to a report from WrestleTix, 27,275 tickets have been distributed for Night One of SummerSlam 2026 on August 1 at U.S. Bank [...]
